name: brain-engineering-os
description: An AI engineering team delivered as a Claude Code plugin. Orchestrates CTO Advisor, Architect, Backend/Frontend/Mobile devs, Security, QA, and DevOps agents through an 8-stage requirement-to-release pipeline grounded in the Brain canon (54 curated skills + business + technical primer). Install once, use in any Brain product repo. Shared memory lives in the consuming project's `.engineering-os/` (committed to git).

engineering-os.memory-model: git-committed append-only journals in the Brain product repo

team.cto-advisor: Rishabh (Founder/CTO) — shadow CTO Advisor agent supports him
